body_txt: Grow old along with me. The best is yet to be. This trope is when a romantic couple is depicted going on into their golden years. If mortality or mental illness is a theme, this is a sure recipe for tear jerkers aplenty. (Expect a chance of Together in Death , for instance.) May combine with Babies Ever After by also depicting their descendants, who are often numerous. Compare December–December Romance , wherein the couple meets in their senior years.
